scope: Week10-11 canary approval for B observation and A/S handoff

dependency.requirement: Week9 C/D-only canary has completed entry checks and has no unresolved P0/P1 incident.

canary_window.name: Week10-11 B observation plus A/S handoff

b_observation_rules: B users may receive AI-assisted handling only.
B users must remain visible in admin monitoring.
B users must be escalated to operator review when repeated failures, high-risk signals, or payment intent appears.
B users are not approved for full ai_auto treatment in Week10-11.
as_handoff_rules: A and S users must route to manual_premium.
A and S users require operator visibility before or during reply handling.
A and S users must not be included in C/D automatic cutover cohorts.
Operator override may downgrade automation but must not bypass safety rules.

entry_gates: H-07 Week9 C/D-only approval is accepted.
No unresolved P0/P1 incident remains from Week9 canary.
J-01 level smoke proves S/A route to manual_premium, B routes to ai_assisted, and C/D route to ai_auto.
/health/detail returns api, db, and redis as ok.
Admin conversation list and operator handoff views load for review.
A backup newer than 24 hours exists before enabling Week10-11 canary.

required_checks: route distribution by manual_premium, ai_assisted, ai_auto
messages by sender_type in the last 24 hours
success_indicators: C/D automatic flow remains stable after H-07.
B users stay on ai_assisted and remain observable.
A/S users route to manual_premium and are visible to operators.
No A/S user is processed as ai_auto.
No B user is processed as full ai_auto.
Handoff queue age remains within the operator SLA.

pause_conditions: Assistant replies fail for more than 10 minutes.
Any A or S user is routed to ai_auto.
Any B user is routed to ai_auto without explicit operator approval.
A/S handoff queue age exceeds 15 minutes for any active user.
Two users fail onboarding during the Week10-11 window.
Any data-loss or privacy exposure symptom appears.
D8 beta report cannot be generated when requested.

rollback_plan.primary_action: Disable Week10-11 B observation and A/S handoff expansion, then return to the H-07 C/D-only policy.
rollback_plan.secondary_action: If H-07 behavior is also unstable, disable all canary traffic by setting eligible traffic percent to 0.
resume_conditions: A/S handoff route is verified as manual_premium.
B route is verified as ai_assisted.
Admin conversation list and handoff view load.
Incident note or release note records the pause and fix.

product_acceptance: Week10-11 expansion is approved only after H-07 is accepted.
B level is approved for observation via ai_assisted, not full ai_auto.
A/S levels are approved for manual_premium handoff only.
Pause and rollback criteria explicitly protect A/S and B routing boundaries.
Approval is ready to guide P5-09 feature flag behavior.
